creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


not a problem to be reported by GNATS. 
If you have problems unsubcribing by email (which really works), you 
may use the web-interface for lists management at: 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/name-of-the-list-here 
If you still have problems, please contact the list administrators.
